topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Unify chaotic admin UI: consolidate expense (withdrawal) and income (deposit) categorization actions into one coherent flow; merge Bulk Categorization, Batch Jobs, and Individual Jobs into a single Run & Monitor workspace so operators start jobs and see progress without switching sidebar panels.

Admin UI in public/index.html (side-panel nav setupSidePanel, panel-manual, panel-batch, panel-individual, Test Webhook panel); minimal App.js API route labels only if needed for unified job types; preserve Socket.io job/batch-job events and existing REST endpoints.

Brownfield monolithic index.html (~5.7k lines); must preserve side-panel nav groups (Categorizer / Special tools / Maintenance) from vision; no breaking changes to /api/process-uncategorized, /api/process-all, /api/test-webhook, or batch-job pause/resume/cancel; US-0004 review panel must remain reachable.

Manual UX checklist: starting bulk uncategorized/all opens integrated progress view; webhook test result visible in same job monitor; withdrawal/deposit scope selectable in one control (respect skip-deposits setting); sidebar no longer lists separate Batch Jobs and Individual Jobs entries; regression: Socket.io batch progress and individual job updates still render.

Done when operator can start any categorization run (bulk or test webhook) from one panel, monitor batch and individual jobs together with clear status, and expense/income scope is expressed once — plus docs/user-guides/US-0005.md when USER_GUIDE_MODE=1.

decomposition.rationale: Bounded UI/UX vertical slice: navigation IA + unified run/monitor panel is one operator-facing deliverable.
decomposition.alternative_considered: Split sidebar IA vs job-monitor merge — rejected; partial fix would leave execution flow confusing.
